case_title: JIEKANG SITU VS. BENJAMIN LAM ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON JANUARY 29, 2025 @ 8:30 AM.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SITU, JIEKANG ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE: $50.00 (WAIVED) REMARKS: NO ANSWER AT THE TIME OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SITU, JIEKANG AS TO DEFENDANT LAM, BENJAMIN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-11-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-29-2025 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY SITU, JIEKANG AS TO DEFENDANT LAM, BENJAMIN SHEN, JUN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-11-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-29-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-28-2025 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. VISITING JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JIEKANG SITU. DEFENDANTS BENJAMIN LAM AND JUN SHEN NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JIEKANG SITU IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS BENJAMIN LAM AND JUN SHEN BOTH NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
